name: Bench Press
description: The king of chest exercises for building upper body strength and size.
descriptionNepali: छातीको व्यायामको राजा, माथिल्लो शरीरको शक्ति र आकार बढाउनको लागि।
instructions: Lie flat on the bench with eyes under the bar
Grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder-width
Unrack the bar and lower it to your mid-chest
Press the bar back up explosively
Lock out at the top and repeat
tips: Maintain natural arch in lower back

name: Squat
description: The fundamental lower body compound movement for building total leg power.
descriptionNepali: खुट्टाको शक्ति बनाउनको लागि आधारभूत तल्लो शरीरको व्यायाम।
instructions: Stand with bar on upper traps, feet shoulder-width apart
Brace your core and take a deep breath
Sit back and down, keeping chest tall
Descend until thighs are parallel to floor
Drive through heels to stand back up

name: Deadlift
description: The ultimate full-body strength exercise that builds posterior chain power.
descriptionNepali: सम्पूर्ण शरीरको शक्ति व्यायाम जसले पश्च शृंखलाको शक्ति बनाउँछ।
instructions: Stand with bar over mid-foot, feet hip-width apart
Hinge at hips and grip bar just outside legs
Drop hips, lift chest, create tension
Push floor away and keep bar close to body
Lock hips and knees at top, then lower with control
tips: Think about pushing the floor away

name: Pull-Up
description: The best bodyweight exercise for building a wide, powerful back.
descriptionNepali: चौडा, शक्तिशाली पछाडि बनाउनको लागि उत्कृष्ट शरीर भार व्यायाम।
instructions: Hang from bar with overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulders
Depress and retract your scapula
Pull your elbows down and back
Chin clears the bar at the top
Lower with control to full hang

name: Overhead Press
description: The primary shoulder strength builder that also engages the entire upper body.
descriptionNepali: प्राथमिक काँध शक्ति निर्माणकर्ता जसले सम्पूर्ण माथिल्लो शरीरलाई संलग्न गर्छ।
instructions: Hold barbell at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width
Tuck elbows slightly in front of bar
Press bar straight overhead while moving head back
Lock out arms at top
Lower bar back to shoulders with control
tips: Think about pushing yourself away from the bar

name: Dumbbell Curl
description: Classic isolation exercise for building bicep peak and arm size.
descriptionNepali: बाइसेप शिखर र बाहुको आकार बनाउनको लागि क्लासिक आइसोलेशन व्यायाम।
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells at sides, palms facing forward
Keep upper arms stationary against body
Curl weights up to shoulder level
Squeeze biceps hard at the top
Lower slowly to starting position

name: Plank
description: The foundational core stability exercise for building functional strength.
descriptionNepali: कार्यात्मक शक्ति बनाउनको लागि आधारभूत कोर स्थिरता व्यायाम।
instructions: Start in push-up position on forearms
Body forms straight line from head to heels
Squeeze core, glutes, and quads
Don't let hips sag or pike up
Hold for prescribed duration
tips: Imagine pulling belly button to spine

name: Romanian Deadlift
description: Superior hamstring and glute developer that builds the posterior chain.
descriptionNepali: ह्यामस्ट्रिङ र ग्लुट विकासकर्ता जसले पश्च शृंखला बनाउँछ।
instructions: Hold bar at hip level, feet hip-width apart
Hinge at hips, pushing them back
Lower bar along legs while maintaining back position
Feel the hamstring stretch at the bottom
Drive hips forward to return to start
tips: Think about 'breaking the bar' to engage lats
Feel the stretch before coming up

name: Push-Up
description: The timeless bodyweight chest exercise for building pushing strength anywhere.
descriptionNepali: जहाँ पनि धकेल्ने शक्ति बनाउनको लागि कालातीत शरीर भार छाती व्यायाम।
instructions: Start in high plank position, hands slightly wider than shoulders
Lower body until chest nearly touches floor
Keep elbows at 45-degree angle from body
Push back up to starting position
Maintain rigid plank position throughout
tips: Breathe in on way down, out on way up

name: Running Intervals
description: High-intensity interval running to build speed and cardiovascular capacity.
descriptionNepali: गति र हृदय-श्वासप्रश्वास क्षमता बनाउनको लागि उच्च-तीव्रता अन्तराल दौड।
instructions: Warm up with 5-10 min easy jog
Run at 85-95% max effort for prescribed interval
Recover with easy jog or walk
Repeat for prescribed number of sets
Cool down with 5-10 min easy jog
tips: Focus on form even when tired

name: Lat Pulldown
description: Machine-based exercise for building back width and lat development.
descriptionNepali: पछाडिको चौडाई र ल्याट विकासको लागि मेशिन-आधारित व्यायाम।
instructions: Sit at pulldown machine, thighs secured under pads
Grip bar wider than shoulder-width
Lean back slightly and pull bar to upper chest
Squeeze lats at bottom of movement
Return bar slowly to start
tips: Think about pulling elbows to hip pockets

name: Hip Flexor Stretch
description: Essential mobility exercise for counteracting sitting and improving running form.
descriptionNepali: बस्ने र दौडको फारम सुधार्नको लागि आवश्यक गतिशीलता व्यायाम।
instructions: Kneel on one knee in lunge position
Keep front knee at 90 degrees over ankle
Push hips forward and down
Raise same-side arm overhead for deeper stretch
Hold for 30-60 seconds each side
tips: Squeeze glute of back leg to deepen stretch

name: Dumbbell Row
description: A unilateral back exercise that builds thickness and corrects imbalances.
descriptionNepali: एकतर्फी पिठ्यूँ व्यायाम जसले असन्तुलन सुधार्छ।
instructions: Place one hand and knee on bench
Row dumbbell up to hip
Keep elbow close to body
Lower with control
Repeat other side
tips: Imagine pulling elbow back, not lifting weight

name: Tricep Dip
description: Bodyweight tricep builder using parallel bars or a bench.
descriptionNepali: बारवेट ट्राइसेप निर्माण व्यायाम।
instructions: Support yourself on bars/bench
Lower body by bending elbows
Keep elbows pointing back
Press back up to start
Keep torso upright
tips: Add weight when bodyweight is easy

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
description: Single-leg squat variation with rear foot elevated for max quad and glute activation.
descriptionNepali: एकल खुट्टाको स्क्वाट जसले क्वाड र ग्लुट सक्रिय गर्छ।
instructions: Stand 2 feet in front of bench
Place rear foot on bench
Lower front knee toward floor
Keep front shin vertical
Drive through front heel up
tips: Take time to find foot position

name: Cable Fly
description: Isolation fly movement for chest using cables for constant tension.
descriptionNepali: केबल प्रयोग गरेर छातीको आइसोलेशन व्यायाम।
instructions: Set cables at shoulder height
Stand in middle with one foot forward
Hold handles and bring hands together in front
Control the return
Keep slight bend in elbows throughout
tips: Focus on the squeeze at centre

name: Leg Press
description: Machine-based compound leg exercise, great for beginners to overload safely.
descriptionNepali: मेसिनमा गरिने खुट्टाको व्यायाम, शुरुआतीहरूका लागि उत्तम।
instructions: Sit in machine with back flat
Place feet shoulder-width on plate
Lower platform by bending knees to 90°
Press through heels to full extension
Don't lock knees at top
tips: Foot position changes emphasis: high=glutes, low=quads

name: Face Pull
description: Essential shoulder health movement targeting rear delts and external rotators.
descriptionNepali: पछाडिको काँधको मांसपेशी र रोटेटर कफको लागि महत्त्वपूर्ण व्यायाम।
instructions: Set cable at eye height with rope attachment
Step back and hold rope with thumbs up
Pull toward face splitting rope at ears
Externally rotate at end
Slowly return to start
tips: Great for shoulder health and posture

name: Hanging Leg Raise
description: Advanced hanging ab exercise for lower abdominal development.
descriptionNepali: तल्लो पेटको विकासका लागि उन्नत ह्याङ्गिङ एब व्यायाम।
instructions: Hang from pull-up bar with straight arms
Engage core and tilt pelvis
Raise legs until parallel or higher
Control the descent
Avoid swinging
tips: Start with knees bent to build strength

name: Goblet Squat
description: Dumbbell/kettlebell squat variation perfect for learning squat mechanics.
descriptionNepali: स्क्वाटको मेकानिक्स सिक्नको लागि उत्तम डम्बल स्क्वाट।
instructions: Hold dumbbell vertically at chest
Stand with feet slightly wider than hip-width
Squat down keeping chest tall
Drive elbows between knees at bottom
Stand back up powerfully
tips: Use as teaching tool for barbell squat

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
description: Incline press targeting upper chest for a complete chest development.
descriptionNepali: माथिल्लो छातीलाई लक्षित गर्ने इन्क्लाइन प्रेस।
instructions: Set bench to 30-45 degree incline
Hold dumbbells at shoulder height
Press up and slightly inward
Lower with full control
Don't flare elbows excessively

name: Hip Thrust
description: The most effective glute isolation exercise for maximum glute activation.
descriptionNepali: अधिकतम ग्लुट सक्रियताका लागि सबैभन्दा प्रभावकारी व्यायाम।
instructions: Sit against bench with barbell/dumbbell on hips
Plant feet flat, shoulder-width
Drive hips up by squeezing glutes
Full extension at top
Lower with control
commonMistakes: Feet too far or too close
tips: Add a band above knees for extra activation

name: Arnold Press
description: Full shoulder development press with rotation, named after Arnold Schwarzenegger.
descriptionNepali: अर्नोल्ड श्वार्जनेगरको नाममा रहेको काँधको पूर्ण विकास व्यायाम।
instructions: Hold dumbbells at shoulder, palms facing you
As you press up, rotate palms outward
Finish with palms facing forward overhead
Reverse rotation as you lower
Full range of motion

name: Bicycle Crunch
description: Studies show this as one of the highest rectus abdominis and oblique activating exercises.
descriptionNepali: अध्ययनले देखाएको सबैभन्दा बढी एब र ओब्लिक सक्रिय गर्ने व्यायाम।
instructions: Lie on back, hands behind head
Lift shoulders and legs off ground
Bring right elbow to left knee
Extend right leg simultaneously
Alternate sides in cycling motion
tips: Think elbow to knee not just twisting

name: Box Jump
description: Explosive plyometric exercise that builds power and burns maximum calories.
descriptionNepali: शक्ति निर्माण र क्यालोरी जलाउने विस्फोटक प्लाइओमेट्रिक व्यायाम।
instructions: Stand facing a sturdy box
Bend knees slightly and swing arms back
Explode up landing softly on box
Stand tall then step down
Reset and repeat
tips: Start low and build up height

name: Mountain Climber
description: High-intensity bodyweight exercise combining core strength with cardiovascular conditioning.
descriptionNepali: कोर शक्ति र कार्डियो एकसाथ गर्ने उच्च तीव्रतामा व्यायाम।
instructions: Start in push-up position
Drive right knee toward chest
Quickly switch legs in running motion
Keep hips level throughout
Maintain fast pace

name: Hammer Curl
description: Neutral grip curl variation targeting brachialis for arm thickness.
descriptionNepali: भुजाको मोटाइका लागि ब्र्याचियालिस लक्षित गर्ने कर्ल।
instructions: Hold dumbbells with neutral grip (thumbs up)
Curl up keeping elbows at sides
Don't rotate wrists during movement
Lower with full control
Alternate or do both simultaneously
tips: Keeps tension on brachialis more than regular curl

name: Cable Tricep Pushdown
description: Cable machine tricep isolation exercise for consistent tension throughout.
descriptionNepali: केबल मेसिनमा ट्राइसेपको आइसोलेशन व्यायाम।
instructions: Set cable high with rope or bar attachment
Grab attachment with overhand grip
Keep elbows at sides
Push down until arms straight
Slowly return to start
tips: Elbows fixed to sides is key
Rope allows wrists to rotate for extra squeeze

name: Good Morning
description: Hip hinge movement strengthening the posterior chain for injury prevention.
descriptionNepali: चोटपटक रोक्न पोस्टेरियर चेन बलियो बनाउने हिप हिन्ज व्यायाम।
instructions: Place bar on upper back
Hinge at hips pushing them back
Lower torso until nearly parallel
Keep back straight and knees soft
Drive hips forward to stand
tips: Think 'show your chest to the floor'

name: Jump Rope
description: Classic cardio exercise burning up to 10-16 calories per minute.
descriptionNepali: प्रति मिनेट १०-१६ क्यालोरी जलाउने उत्कृष्ट कार्डियो व्यायाम।
instructions: Hold handles with relaxed grip
Jump just high enough for rope to pass
Land on balls of feet
Keep elbows close to body
Use wrist to turn rope not full arm

name: Seated Cable Row
description: Machine rowing movement for building a thick, wide back.
descriptionNepali: बाक्लो र चौडा पिठ्यूँ बनाउने मेसिन रोइङ व्यायाम।
instructions: Sit at cable row machine, feet on platform
Grab handle with neutral grip
Sit tall and pull handle to abdomen
Squeeze shoulder blades together
Return with full arm extension
tips: Drive elbows back not just pulling arms
Chest should come slightly forward at end
Variety: wide/neutral grip for different emphasis

name: Calf Raise
description: Isolation exercise for building calf muscle size and strength.
descriptionNepali: काफ मांसपेशीको आकार र शक्तिका लागि आइसोलेशन व्यायाम।
instructions: Stand on edge of step or flat
Rise up on toes as high as possible
Hold briefly at top
Lower heel below step level
Feel full stretch at bottom
tips: Calves need high reps (15-30) to grow

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
description: Highly effective core exercise using an ab wheel for anti-extension strength.
descriptionNepali: एब ह्वील प्रयोग गरेर कोरको शक्तिको लागि प्रभावकारी व्यायाम।
instructions: Kneel with ab wheel in front
Roll forward extending body low to floor
Brace core throughout movement
Use core to pull back to start
Don't let hips sag
tips: Wall stops are great for beginners

name: Burpee
description: Total body conditioning exercise combining squat, push-up, and jump.
descriptionNepali: स्क्वाट, पुशअप र जम्प मिलाएर पूर्ण शरीर कन्डिसनिङ व्यायाम।
instructions: Stand upright
Drop hands to floor, jump feet back to push-up position
Perform push-up
Jump feet back to hands
Explode up with jump and clap overhead
tips: Scale: step back instead of jumping

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
description: Isolation exercise for building side delts to create the wide-shoulder V-taper look.
descriptionNepali: चौडा काँधको V-आकारका लागि साइड डेल्टको आइसोलेशन व्यायाम।
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides
Raise arms to sides until parallel to floor
Lead with elbows, not hands
Hold briefly at top
Lower with control
tips: Slight forward lean targets medial delt best

name: Glute Bridge
description: Beginner-friendly floor exercise for glute activation and strengthening.
descriptionNepali: ग्लुट सक्रियता र बलियो बनाउनको लागि शुरुआती-अनुकूल व्यायाम।
instructions: Lie on back with knees bent, feet flat
Drive hips up by squeezing glutes
Lift until body forms straight line
Hold 2 seconds at top
Lower slowly
tips: Excellent warm-up for any lower body day
Add barbell for hip thrust variation
